name: CLX - Sentinel Cost Threshold Check v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Cron every 4h. Sums month-to-date spend per service, compares to sentinel_cost_budgets, raises alerts at warning/critical thresholds. Critical alerts also call the auto-pause workflow.

parameters.jsCode:
const alerts = $input.item.json.alerts || [];
return alerts.map(function (a) { return { json: a }; });
